top_signals.title: Oil prices fall after Pakistan says U.S. and Iran have reached final peace deal text - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fall after Pakistan says U.S. and Iran have reached final peace deal text  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk’s Trillionaire Moment
top_signals.summary: As Elon Musk is poised to be crowned the world’s first trillionaire, Bloomberg’s Max Chafkin and Ed Ludlow break down Musk’s growing control of SpaceX, the possibility of a Tesla, SpaceX merger, and why investors will follow Musk to the Moon, despite mounting questions about governance and execution. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Future of Farming in Space
top_signals.summary: Interstellar Lab founder Barbara Belvisi joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why SpaceX’s IPO could reshape the space economy. She reveals how greenhouse technology designed for Mars is already generating revenue on Earth, and why future space farms will do far more than grow food, serving as complete life-support systems that produce oxygen, recycle water, and enable long-term human habitation on the Moon and Mars. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea finance ministry says tokenized stocks are securities, not crypto assets, opening door to taxes: report
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s finance ministry said tokenized stocks are securities, opening potential taxation as early as H2 2026 if regulators agree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Is Troubling Sign for Markets, Chanos Says
top_signals.summary: Veteran short seller James Chanos says the SpaceX mega IPO is a troubling sign for the broader markets. He says "we're going to shatter" records this year when it comes to IPOs. He speaks to Tom Keene and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)
